title: Buildah images JSON output duplicate when image has more than one name
body:
**Description**

Using buildah images --json shows duplicated image block when an image has more than one name.

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**
1. buildah tag centos:latest test
2. buildah images --json

**Describe the results you received:**
The images command display the image twice:

```
{
    "id": "1e1148e4cc2c148c6890a18e3b2d2dde41a6745ceb4e5fe94a923d811bf82ddb",
    "names": [
        "docker.io/library/centos:latest",
        "localhost/test:latest"
    ]
}
{
    "id": "1e1148e4cc2c148c6890a18e3b2d2dde41a6745ceb4e5fe94a923d811bf82ddb",
    "names": [
        "docker.io/library/centos:latest",
        "localhost/test:latest"
    ]
}
```

**Describe the results you expected:**

The image only needs to be displayed once. It seems to be happening since 7c2467ca715455034d31c7e6b429563c7966c78c

**Output of `buildah version`:**

```
Version:         1.6-dev
Go Version:      go1.10.5
Image Spec:      1.0.0
Runtime Spec:    1.0.0
CNI Spec:        0.4.0
libcni Version:  v0.7.0-alpha1
Git Commit:      579f1d52
Built:           Fri Jan  4 13:07:14 2019
OS/Arch:         linux/amd64
```
